LanguageData.VV_Command_CollectScentDesc: Select a flower to record its scent. {0} slots remain.
LanguageData.VV_Command_SprayPerfumeDesc: Scatter perfume powder over all near flesh creatures. {1} uses remain.
LanguageData.VV_Command_ReloadPerfumeBottleDesc: Spend {0} {1} to prepare the empty bottle for another blend.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_NoArcaneEffect: Ordinary flowers add a pleasant fragrance but no arcane effect.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_CannotCollectState: This perfume bottle cannot collect another scent in its current state.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_MustBeWorn: The perfume bottle must be worn to use it.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_InvalidFlower: This target does not have a scent that the bottle can record.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_FlowerTooYoung: This flower must reach 70% growth before its scent can be collected.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_FlowerUnreachable: The flower is forbidden, reserved, or unreachable.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_EmberBloom: Emberbloom warmth improves cold tolerance; concentrated blends also accelerate immunity gain.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_FrostBloom: Frostbloom coolness improves heat tolerance; concentrated blends slow the buildup of fatigue.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Shockerbud: Flashbud electricity improves melee skills; concentrated blends also increase melee damage.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Thunderpetals: Thunderpetal energy improves shooting accuracy and shortens ranged cooldowns; concentrated blends also reduce aiming delay.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Waterdrops: Waterdrop freshness improves toxic resistance; concentrated blends also reduce flammability.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Radiantflower: Radiantflower light lowers the mental break threshold; concentrated blends also speed injury healing.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Richflower: Richflower abundance improves overall work speed; concentrated blends also increase yields from nature.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Starlitflower: Starlitflower fragrance raises the pain shock threshold and improves vacuum resistance; concentrated blends also accelerate learning.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Everflower: Everflower resonance heightens psychic sensitivity; concentrated blends also greatly increase movement speed.
